channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Orlando Pirates likely to clinch league title at FNB or Mbombela Stadium
item.description: Orlando Pirates are poised to secure the league championship in their final game of the season against relegation-threatened Orbit College, but the venue remains undecided. Originally scheduled at Rus...

item.title: Meralco lowers May 2026 power rates, but higher consumption may raise household bills
item.description: Meralco announced a slight decrease in electricity rates for May 2026, reducing the overall rate by P0.0151 per kilowatt hour (kWh), bringing it down to P14.3345 per kWh from April’s P14.3496. Despite...

item.title: Behind the Scenes: Michelle Pfeiffer’s Role as Isabeau in Ladyhawke (1985)
item.description: Michelle Pfeiffer's portrayal of Isabeau d’Anjou in the 1985 fantasy film Ladyhawke marked a pivotal moment in her career, solidifying her status as a Hollywood icon. Initially hesitant to take on the...

item.title: Ike Shorunmu appointed temporary coach of Abia Warriors after Amapakabo suspension
item.description: Na big wahala dey for Abia Warriors camp as dem don suspend technical adviser Imama Amapakabo and chief coach Bethel Oji over alleged insubordination. Dis suspension come after some incidents during A...

item.title: Pension Fund Board Held Accountable for Delayed Death Benefit Payments
item.description: A pensioner’s long-running struggle to claim her late son’s death benefit has highlighted serious governance failures within the Chemical Industries National Provident Fund. The claim, lodged in 2017 ...

item.title: Breakdown of House votes on Sara Duterte’s second impeachment in 2026
item.description: A total of 257 members of the Philippine House of Representatives voted to impeach Vice President Sara Duterte for the second time on May 11, 2026. This figure is significant because it goes beyond th...

item.title: High Court confirms inheritance rights for Marquess of Bath’s surrogate-born son
item.description: Ceawlin Thynn, the 8th Marquess of Bath, has successfully obtained a High Court ruling allowing his son, Henry, born via surrogacy in the United States, to potentially inherit part of the family's £15...

item.title: Visayas Power Grid Remains on Yellow Alert Amid Ongoing Supply Concerns
item.description: The Visayas power grid has been placed on Yellow Alert for the second consecutive day, signaling potential strain on the region's electricity supply. The alert status, issued by the National Grid Corp...

item.title: Behind-the-Scenes Photos of Kirsten Dunst on the Set of The Virgin Suicides
item.description: This article presents a collection of behind-the-scenes photographs of Kirsten Dunst during the filming of Sofia Coppola's 1999 film, The Virgin Suicides. At the time, Dunst was 16 years old while fil...

item.title: South Africa's unemployment rises amid job losses and new entrants to the labour market
item.description: South Africa is facing a worsening unemployment situation, with the rate increasing by more than 1% between the last quarter of 2025 and the first quarter of 2026. According to Stats SA, the number of...

item.title: Court Hears Witness Say Suspects Made Statements Freely in Alleged Coup Trial
item.description: For Abuja Federal High Court, na Tuesday wey six men wey dem dey accuse for last year alleged coup against President Bola Tinubu voluntarily give their confessional statements, according to one witnes...

item.title: NWU honours choral composer Kgotlaetsile Henderson Pule with honorary doctorate
item.description: During the autumn graduation ceremony at the Mahikeng Campus on 8 May 2026, North-West University (NWU) conferred an honorary doctorate on esteemed choral music composer and educator Kgotlaetsile Hend...

item.title: Jason Collins, Former NBA Player, Passes Away at 47 After Brain Cancer Battle
item.description: Former NBA player Jason Collins, aged 47, has passed away following a courageous fight against stage four glioblastoma, an aggressive form of brain cancer. Collins’ family shared the news on May 12, 2...

item.title: Five Senators Call on Bato dela Rosa to Surrender to Proper Authorities Amid ICC Warrant
item.description: Five Philippine senators have signed Resolution No. 395 urging Senator Ronald 'Bato' dela Rosa to voluntarily surrender to the proper authorities following the public release of an International Crimi...

item.title: Government and traders discuss reducing loudspeaker noise in markets
item.description: Dar es Salaam authorities and market stakeholders are looking into ways to address noise pollution caused by loudspeakers in markets, which is becoming a major concern for residents and health experts...

item.title: Jason Collins, NBA's first openly gay player, dies aged 47 after brain cancer
item.description: Jason Collins, the first openly gay player in the NBA, has tragically passed away at the age of 47 after battling a malignant brain tumour. Collins, a former centre, came out publicly in 2013 while a ...

item.title: A Look at Tammi Terrell's Life and Career in the 1960s
item.description: Tammi Terrell, born Thomasina Winifred Montgomery on April 29, 1945, in Philadelphia, was a celebrated American singer best known for her work with Motown Records during the 1960s. She demonstrated mu...

item.title: TADB Supports Women and Smallholder Farmers with Climate Funding
item.description: Tanzania Agricultural Development Bank (TADB) is stepping up efforts to empower women and smallholder farmers by offering targeted financing aimed at supporting climate-friendly agricultural practices...

item.title: Tanzanite Queens Make History by Qualifying for FIFA U-20 Women’s World Cup
item.description: President Samia Suluhu Hassan has joined all Tanzanians in celebrating the Tanzania women’s under-20 football team, the Tanzanite Queens, after they made history by qualifying for the 2026 FIFA U-20 W...

item.title: Orlando Pirates likely to clinch league title at FNB or Mbombela Stadium
item.description: Orlando Pirates are poised to secure the PSL championship in their final league match of the season against relegation-threatened Orbit College. Originally scheduled to be played at Rustenburg’s Royal...
